metadata.name: turf_vault
metadata.description: Solana escrow program for contest entry fees and prize distribution

instructions.name: close_contest
docs: Close a settled contest's account, reclaiming rent to the admin.
1-of-3 vault signer.

instructions.name: create_contest
docs: Create a new contest. Dual-signer: payer (admin bot, pays SOL rent) +
creator (Phantom wallet, signs prize-pool USDC transfer from their ATA).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Admin bot — pays SOL rent for Contest PDA

accounts.name: creator
docs: Creator's Phantom wallet — signs USDC transfer for prizes

accounts.name: creator_token_account
docs: Creator's USDC token account (ATA) — source of prizes

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's USDC token account — destination for prizes

instructions.name: create_season
docs: Create a Season with an immutable per-entry seed-award schedule.
1-of-3 vault signer.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Vault signer (admin) — pays SOL rent for the Season PDA.

instructions.name: create_user_account
docs: Create a new per-wallet UserAccount PDA. Permissionless payer (any
wallet can pay rent for any user's account); the username is set at
creation time and can later be changed via `set_username`.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: User → vault SPL token transfer. Credits UserAccount.balance.
Blocked when vault is paused.

instructions.name: enter_contest
docs: Managed-wallet entry: debits UserAccount.balance for the entry fee
and creates the ContestEntry. 1-of-3 vault signer pays rent.
Blocked when vault is paused.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: The wallet that owns the user account (may differ from payer for custodial)

accounts.name: season
docs: Season whose seed_schedule controls per-entry seed awards.
OPSEC-023: seeds-pinned to the contest's bound season so a caller
can't substitute a richer-reward season.

instructions.name: enter_contest_direct
docs: Phantom-wallet entry: user signs an SPL transfer from their ATA →
vault USDC PDA. Admin pays SOL rent. Blocked when vault is paused.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Admin pays rent for the ContestEntry PDA

accounts.name: user
docs: The user's Phantom wallet — signs the token transfer

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's USDC token account (ATA) — source of entry fee

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's USDC token account — destination for entry fee

accounts.name: season
docs: Season whose seed_schedule controls per-entry seed awards.
OPSEC-023: seeds-pinned to the contest's bound season so a caller
can't substitute a richer-reward season.

instructions.name: enter_contest_direct_with_token
docs: Phantom-wallet entry funded by consuming an EntryTokenAccount.
User signs; admin pays SOL rent. Blocked when vault is paused.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Admin pays rent for the ContestEntry PDA

accounts.name: user
docs: The user's Phantom wallet — signs to authorize token consumption

accounts.name: entry_token
docs: EntryTokenAccount being consumed to fund this entry.
Must be owned by `user` and not yet consumed.

accounts.name: season
docs: Season whose seed_schedule controls per-entry seed awards.
OPSEC-023: seeds-pinned to the contest's bound season so a caller
can't substitute a richer-reward season.

instructions.name: enter_contest_with_token
docs: Managed-wallet entry funded by consuming an EntryTokenAccount
(no USDC charged). Wallet must co-sign to consent (OPSEC-004).
Blocked when vault is paused.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: The wallet that owns the user account + the entry token being consumed.
OPSEC-004: now a required Signer. Previously an UncheckedAccount, which
let any 1-of-3 vault signer (e.g. a compromised Alex Bot key) burn ANY
user's entry token without the owner's consent. For managed (web2)
wallets the server co-signs with the user's custodial keypair — so a
leaked admin key alone is no longer sufficient to consume tokens.

accounts.name: entry_token
docs: EntryTokenAccount being consumed to fund this entry.
Must be owned (logically) by `wallet` and not yet consumed.

accounts.name: season
docs: Season whose seed_schedule controls per-entry seed awards.
OPSEC-023: seeds-pinned to the contest's bound season so a caller
can't substitute a richer-reward season.

instructions.name: force_close_vault
docs: Close the existing VaultState account to enable a schema migration.
Requires 2-of-3. Only succeeds if the on-chain data is at a DIFFERENT
size than the current schema (won't brick a healthy vault).

accounts.name: vault_state
docs: The existing vault account (old layout). We verify PDA seeds manually.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-time setup of the singleton vault. Only callable by INIT_AUTHORITY
with the canonical USDC + USDT mints for this build.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be INIT_AUTHORITY in mainnet builds (any signer in dev/test).
Pays SOL rent for VaultState + the two token accounts.

accounts.name: vault_state
docs: The new VaultState account. PDA at [b"vault"].

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint. In mainnet builds, must equal EXPECTED_USDC_MINT.

accounts.name: usdt_mint
docs: USDT mint. In mainnet builds, must equal EXPECTED_USDT_MINT.

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Vault's USDC token account. PDA at [b"vault_usdc"], authority = vault_state.

accounts.name: vault_usdt
docs: Vault's USDT token account. PDA at [b"vault_usdt"], authority = vault_state.

instructions.name: migrate_user_account
docs: Resize a UserAccount PDA to the current v0.15.0 layout. Handles
both v0.13 (81 bytes, pre-username) and v0.14 (113 bytes) source
layouts. Idempotent. Admin-only.

accounts.name: user_account
docs: Verified via PDA seeds constraint + discriminator check in handler.

instructions.name: mint_entry_token
docs: Mint a new EntryTokenAccount for a user. 1-of-3 vault signer.
`sequence` is supplied by the caller to avoid PDA collisions when
minting multiple tokens per user.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Vault signer (admin) — pays SOL rent for the EntryTokenAccount PDA.

accounts.name: user_wallet
docs: `owner` on the new account. Not a signer; not modified.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Emergency stop: blocks deposit / withdraw / enter_contest*. 2-of-3.
`reason` is logged on-chain (UTF-8 zero-padded to 64 bytes).

instructions.name: set_username
docs: Set / overwrite the username on a UserAccount. Signed by the
account owner — no admin involvement.

instructions.name: settle_contest
docs: Grade a contest: assign ranks + credit payouts to winners' UserAccounts.
2-of-3 (admin + cosigner). Uses remaining_accounts for variable-length
settlement arrays. Cap: total payouts ≤ entry_fees + prizes.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Lift the emergency stop. 2-of-3.

instructions.name: update_signers
docs: Rotate the multisig signer set or change the threshold. 2-of-3
required; at least one of the two cosigners must remain in the new
set (OPSEC-027 continuity).

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Vault → user SPL token transfer. Debits UserAccount.balance.
Capped at $100 per rolling 24h window per user (v0.15.0).
Blocked when vault is paused.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the vault admin can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Token mint is not accepted by this vault

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for this operation

errors.name: ContestNotOpen
errors.msg: Contest is not open for entries

errors.name: ContestFull
errors.msg: Contest is full

errors.name: ContestNotSettled
errors.msg: Contest has not been settled

errors.name: ContestAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Contest is already settled

errors.name: DuplicateEntry
errors.msg: User already entered this contest with this entry number

errors.name: SettlementOverflow
errors.msg: Settlement payouts exceed entry fees plus prizes

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidPayoutTiers
errors.msg: Payout amounts must sum to prizes amount

errors.name: AccountAlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: Account is already larger than expected — cannot migrate

errors.name: InvalidAccountData
errors.msg: Account data is invalid or has wrong discriminator

errors.name: InvalidThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid threshold: must be 1-3

errors.name: DuplicateSigner
errors.msg: Duplicate signer in signers array

errors.name: EntryTokenAlreadyConsumed
errors.msg: Entry token has already been consumed

errors.name: EntryTokenWrongOwner
errors.msg: Entry token owner does not match the wallet entering the contest

errors.name: SignerContinuityRequired
errors.msg: New signer set must retain at least one current cosigner

errors.name: VaultPaused
errors.msg: Vault is paused — user-facing funds operations are temporarily disabled

errors.name: WithdrawDailyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Withdrawal would exceed the $100 / 24h per-user cap

types.name: Contest
docs: One per contest. Holds entry-fee schedule, payout tiers, accumulated
fees, status, and the season the contest is bound to.
PDA seeds: [b"contest", contest_id]  (contest_id = SHA256 of Rails slug)

fields.name: contest_id
docs: SHA256(Rails slug). Stable, opaque, 32 bytes.

fields.name: prizes
docs: Guaranteed prize amount the creator pre-funds at create time.

fields.name: entry_fee
docs: Entry fee per entry, 6-decimal USDC.

fields.name: entry_fees
docs: Total entry fees collected so far. Increments on every paid entry.
Settlement is capped at `entry_fees + prizes`.

fields.name: max_entries
docs: Maximum number of entries this contest accepts.

fields.name: current_entries
docs: Number of entries currently in the contest.

fields.name: status
docs: Current lifecycle state.

fields.name: payout_amounts
docs: USDC paid per rank, 6-decimal. Must sum to `prizes` (validated at
create_contest). Max 10 ranks.

fields.name: admin
docs: Payer pubkey from create_contest (admin bot, pays SOL rent).

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator pubkey (signs the prizes USDC transfer from their ATA).

fields.name: season_id
docs: Season this contest is bound to (OPSEC-023). Pins the seed schedule
so a caller can't substitute a richer-reward season at entry time.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: ContestEntry
docs: One per (contest, wallet, entry_num). A user can have multiple entries
per contest (Rails caps at 3); each gets its own PDA.
PDA seeds: [b"entry", contest_id, wallet.as_ref(), entry_num.to_le_bytes()]

types.name: ContestStatus
docs: Lifecycle of a Contest.
Open    — accepting entries
Locked  — entries closed, awaiting results (no instruction sets this yet)
Settled — graded, payouts credited

types.name: EntryStatus
docs: Status of a single contest entry. Settle transitions Active → Won/Lost.

types.name: EntryTokenAccount
docs: EntryTokenAccount: a pre-purchased contest entry token issued by the admin.
User redeems one of these to enter a contest without paying the entry fee at entry time.
PDA seeds: [b"entry_token", owner.as_ref(), sequence.to_le_bytes().as_ref()]
Discovery: getProgramAccounts filter by `owner`.

types.name: Season
docs: Season: a contest season with a per-entry seed-award schedule.
The schedule is set at season creation and is immutable thereafter.
Entries award `seed_schedule[entry_num.min(4) as usize]` — entries 5+
clamp to slot 4.
PDA seeds: [b"season", season_id.to_le_bytes()] (u32 LE, 4 bytes).

types.name: Settlement
docs: `settle_contest` — grade a contest and credit payouts.
Takes a `Vec<Settlement>` (one per entry, including losers with payout=0)
and a pair of remaining_accounts per Settlement: [user_account, contest_entry].
Verifies each pair against the expected PDA seeds, then:
- Adds `payout` to UserAccount.balance + total_won
- Sets ContestEntry rank + payout, transitions Active → Won/Lost
Cap: total payouts ≤ contest.entry_fees + contest.prizes. Anchor's
remaining_accounts pattern lets us settle a variable number of entries
in one TX (up to compute-budget limits — ~25-30 entries per call on mainnet).
Auth: 2-of-3 (admin + cosigner). Settle is the only path that credits
balances to users, so it requires the highest authorization.
Refusals:
- Duplicate (wallet, entry_num) in the Vec — would double-credit a user
- A ContestEntry already settled (status != Active) — defense in depth

types.name: UserAccount
docs: One per user wallet. Holds the user's vault balance plus lifetime
accounting and v0.15.0's daily-withdraw circuit breaker.
PDA seeds: [b"user", wallet.as_ref()]

fields.name: wallet
docs: Owner wallet.

fields.name: balance
docs: Current spendable balance, 6-decimal USDC. Credited on deposit and
on `settle_contest` winnings; debited on withdraw and on
`enter_contest` (managed-wallet entry fee).

fields.name: total_deposited
docs: Lifetime cumulative deposits. Audit/UX only — never decremented.

fields.name: total_withdrawn
docs: Lifetime cumulative withdrawals. Audit/UX only — never decremented.

fields.name: total_won
docs: Lifetime cumulative winnings credited via settle_contest. Audit/UX only.

fields.name: seeds
docs: Loyalty points awarded per entry from the contest's Season schedule.
Rails derives "level" client-side from this value (level = seeds/100 + 1).

fields.name: username
docs: On-chain master copy of the user's display name (v0.14.0). UTF-8,
zero-padded. Rails mirrors it; only the wallet owner can change via
`set_username`.

fields.name: daily_withdrawn
docs: Lamports withdrawn in the current 24h window (v0.15.0). Resets to
zero when DAILY_WINDOW_SECONDS elapses since daily_window_start.

fields.name: daily_window_start
docs: Unix timestamp of the current window's start (v0.15.0). Zero on
fresh accounts — the first withdraw initializes it.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: VaultState
docs: Singleton vault account. Holds the 2-of-3 multisig signer set, the two
accepted token mints, the vault's token accounts, a bump, and a pause
PDA seeds: [b"vault"]

fields.name: signers
docs: The three multisig signers. 1-of-3 can run routine ops; 2-of-3
needed for treasury ops (settle, force_close, update_signers,
pause, unpause).

fields.name: threshold
docs: Number of distinct signatures required for treasury ops. Currently 2.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint this vault accepts. Set once at init; verified against
EXPECTED_USDC_MINT.

fields.name: usdt_mint
docs: USDT mint this vault accepts. Set once at init; verified against
EXPECTED_USDT_MINT.

fields.name: vault_usdc
docs: Vault's USDC token account (PDA, authority = this vault_state).

fields.name: vault_usdt
docs: Vault's USDT token account (PDA, authority = this vault_state).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency pause flag (v0.15.0). When true, deposit / withdraw /
enter_contest* are rejected. Settle, close, mint_entry_token,
migrate, set_username, create_user_account, create_season,
update_signers, force_close, pause, unpause remain available.
Flipped via the `pause` / `unpause` instructions (2-of-3).
